```shell
  openssl pkeyutl -rawin -inkey "/tmp/canton/certs/root_private_key.der" -keyform DER -sign -in "/tmp/canton/certs/revoked_delegation.hash" -out "/tmp/canton/certs/revoked_delegation.signature"

  openssl pkeyutl -rawin -inkey "/tmp/canton/certs/root_private_key.der" -keyform DER -sign -in "/tmp/canton/certs/new_delegation.hash" -out "/tmp/canton/certs/new_delegation.signature"
```
